message:
feat(web): add 'Getting Back In' reconnection section to launch-onboarding

Adds a cyan-themed "Getting Back In" section with:
- Three numbered steps: open terminal, SSH connect, resume NTM session
- Dynamic VPS IP from user preferences
- Both Mac and Windows SSH commands
- Collapsible SSH config pro tip
- Mobile-friendly layout

Resolves bead bcin.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ import { } from "@/components/simpler-guide"; import { useWizardAnalytics } from "@/lib/hooks/useWizardAnalytics"; import { Jargon } from "@/components/jargon"; +import { useVPSIP } from "@/lib/userPreferences"; // Confetti colors const CONFETTI_COLORS = [ @@ -85,6 +86,10 @@ export default function LaunchOnboardingPage() { stepTitle: "Launch Onboarding", }); + // Get user's VPS IP for reconnection instructions + const [vpsIP] = useVPSIP(); + const displayIP = vpsIP || "YOUR_VPS_IP"; + // Mark all steps complete on reaching this page useEffect(() => { markComplete({ wizard_completed: true }); @@ -247,6 +252,65 @@ export default function LaunchOnboardingPage() { + {/* Getting Back In */} + +
+ +

Getting Back In

+
+ +

+ Closed your terminal? Here's how to reconnect: +

+ +
+
+

1. Open your terminal app

+

+ Ghostty, WezTerm, or Windows Terminal +

+
+ +
+

2. Connect to your VPS

+ +
+ +
+

3. Resume your session (if using NTM)

+ + +

+ This brings back exactly where you left off — including any running Claude sessions! +

+
+
+ + {/* SSH Config tip */} +
+ + 💡 Pro tip: Set up SSH config for easier access + +
+

+ Add this to your local ~/.ssh/config file: +

+ 
+{`Host myserver
+    HostName ${displayIP}
+    User ubuntu
+    IdentityFile ~/.ssh/acfs_ed25519`}
+
+

+ Then just type: ssh myserver +

+
+
+ + {/* What you can do now */}

What you can do now
